message:
fix(engine): prevent secret leakage in audit logs, harden inline comment parsing, and fix evidence bundle setup

key_derivation.rs:
- Add algorithm_label() trait method to KeyDeriver that returns a stable
  human-readable type name without exposing internal deriver state
- Replace format!("{:?}", self.deriver) with self.deriver.algorithm_label()
  in EpochKeyCache audit events — the old Debug output could leak secret
  material from deriver fields into log entries
- Add SecretDebugDeriver test verifying algorithm label does not contain
  internal state that would appear in Debug output

ambient_authority.rs:
- Replace naive .find("//") inline comment detection with a proper
  inline_comment_start() parser that respects string literals (regular
  and raw strings with hash counts) and escape sequences
- Prevents false positives where "//" inside string constants was
  incorrectly treated as a comment boundary, truncating audit patterns
- Add raw_string_start() helper for r#"..."# detection

hostcall_batch_transport.rs:
- Add create_dir_all(dir) before writing evidence bundle files to
  prevent failures when output directory doesn't exist
- Replace {:?} Debug formatting of verdict with .to_string() for
  deterministic event log serialization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
